summary.en: Rove is building a universal airline mile redeemable across dozens of international airlines and hotels.
summary.zh: Rove 打造一種通用的航空里程，可在數十家國際航空公司與飯店集團通用兌換。

highlight.en: Rather than tying rewards to a single carrier, Rove aims to make one accessible mile that works across many airlines and hotel chains worldwide.
highlight.zh: Rove 不將獎勵綁定單一航空公司，而是要打造一種可在全球眾多航空公司與飯店集團通用、人人可用的里程。

summary.en: Datacurve generates expert-quality coding data at scale to train and evaluate LLMs.
summary.zh: Datacurve 大規模產出專家品質的程式碼資料，用於訓練與評估大型語言模型。

highlight.en: Datacurve focuses on the frontier coding data used to fine-tune LLMs, supplying expert-grade examples for both model training and evaluation.
highlight.zh: Datacurve 專注於微調大型語言模型所需的前沿程式碼資料，為模型訓練與評估提供專家級範例。

summary.en: The New Money Company protects invoices with insurance, so you get paid even if your buyer doesn't.
summary.zh: The New Money Company 以保險保障發票，即使買方未付款，你仍能收到貨款。

highlight.en: By insuring invoices, the company lets businesses expand into new markets or industries while offloading the risk of buyers failing to pay.
highlight.zh: 透過為發票投保，該公司讓企業在拓展新市場或新產業時，可將買方違約不付款的風險轉嫁出去。

summary.en: Lantern was a Postgres extension and cloud platform for building AI applications with vector search.
summary.zh: Lantern 是用於建構 AI 應用的 Postgres 向量資料庫擴充套件與雲端平台。

highlight.en: Lantern let developers build AI apps on familiar Postgres, bundling embedding generation, vector compression, vector search, and efficient indexing at scale.
highlight.zh: Lantern 讓開發者在熟悉的 Postgres 上建構 AI 應用，整合嵌入生成、向量壓縮、向量搜尋與高效索引，並可大規模擴展。

summary.en: Cora is a mobile app offering personalized AI fitness coaching using health and wearable data.
summary.zh: Cora 是一款運用健康與穿戴裝置資料、提供個人化 AI 健身指導的行動 App。

highlight.en: By connecting to Apple Watch and other health sources, Cora gauges a user's fitness level and adapts training plans, nutrition targets, and recovery guidance over time.
highlight.zh: Cora 連接 Apple Watch 等健康資料來源，掌握使用者體能水準，並隨時間調整訓練計畫、營養目標與恢復建議。

summary.en: Happenstance is an AI-powered people search that surfaces relevant contacts in your network.
summary.zh: Happenstance 是以 AI 驅動的人脈搜尋工具，能在你的人際網絡中找出相關聯絡人。

highlight.en: Users describe who they want in plain language and Happenstance finds matching people connected to them or their partners, going beyond what LinkedIn search allows.
highlight.zh: 使用者以自然語言描述想找的人，Happenstance 便找出與你或夥伴有連結的相符對象，能力超越 LinkedIn 搜尋。

summary.en: ion uses AI to design, launch, and test hundreds of on-brand landing pages for your product.
summary.zh: ion 運用 AI 為你的產品設計、上線並測試數百個符合品牌調性的著陸頁。

highlight.en: ion gives each ad campaign, use case, case study, and competitor comparison its own dedicated, conversion-focused page, acting like a growth designer working around the clock.
highlight.zh: ion 為每個廣告活動、使用情境、案例研究與競品比較打造專屬的轉換導向頁面，宛如全天候運作的成長設計師。

summary.en: Tekton Dynamics builds an AI control layer that gives industrial welding robots vision and reasoning.
summary.zh: Tekton Dynamics 打造 AI 控制層，讓工業焊接機器人具備視覺與推理能力。

highlight.en: Tekton's proprietary vision system and AI model let traditionally 'blind' industrial robots see, reason, and perform complex welding with sub-millimeter accuracy and human-like adaptability.
highlight.zh: Tekton 自研的視覺系統與 AI 模型，讓傳統「盲目」的工業機器人能看見、推理，並以次毫米精度與近人類的適應力完成複雜焊接。

summary.en: Precip uses AI to deliver high-precision, hyperlocal weather observations, starting with rain.
summary.zh: Precip 運用 AI 提供高精度、超在地化的天氣觀測，首先聚焦於降雨。

highlight.en: Precip starts with rain as the most actionable weather dimension—one customer uses it daily to keep heavy trucks from getting stuck in muddy fields—plus a highly rated app for rain and snow totals.
highlight.zh: Precip 以最具行動價值的降雨為起點——有客戶每天用它確保重型卡車不會陷入泥濘田地——並提供查詢各地雨雪量、評價極佳的 App。

summary.en: nCompass Technologies builds an AI agent that optimizes GPU performance up to 10x faster.
summary.zh: nCompass Technologies 打造的 AI 代理能讓 GPU 效能優化速度提升最高 10 倍。

highlight.en: Its agent analyzes GPU systems from CPU-GPU interactions down to kernels, and pairs with Cursor or Claude Code to automate both the reasoning and code steps of performance work.
highlight.zh: 其代理能從 CPU-GPU 互動到 GPU 核心逐層分析 GPU 系統，並搭配 Cursor 或 Claude Code，自動化效能優化的推理與寫程式兩個步驟。

summary.en: Wavelength is an AI-native customer intelligence platform built for post-sales teams.
summary.zh: Wavelength 是專為售後團隊打造的 AI 原生客戶情報平台。

highlight.en: Wavelength consolidates a company's entire customer data stack in one place, with AI agents that surface important signals and act on them instantly.
highlight.zh: Wavelength 將公司整個客戶資料堆疊整合於一處，並以 AI 代理即時揪出重要訊號並採取行動。

summary.en: AveryIQ is an AI copilot that helps property managers fill vacancies and resolve maintenance requests.
summary.zh: AveryIQ 是協助物業經理填補空房並處理維修需求的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Avery's AI property manager and leasing agents handle repetitive tenant tasks—from scheduling tours to following up with vendors—via a two-way contact center for the ~300,000 US property management firms.
highlight.zh: Avery 的 AI 物業經理與租賃專員透過雙向客服中心處理重複的租客事務——從安排看房到追蹤廠商——服務全美約 30 萬家物業管理公司。

summary.en: Verse Therapy helps speech-language pathologists launch and grow their own independent practices.
summary.zh: Verse Therapy 協助語言治療師創立並經營自己的獨立執業診所。

highlight.en: Verse handles marketing, insurance, scheduling, and documentation through an AI-enabled back office, and was live in 10 states with over 35 therapists, in-network with leading insurers.
highlight.zh: Verse 透過 AI 驅動的後勤系統處理行銷、保險、排程與文件作業，已在 10 州營運、擁有逾 35 位治療師，並與主要保險公司簽約。

summary.en: Yoneda Labs builds a foundation model that helps chemists optimize chemical reaction conditions.
summary.zh: Yoneda Labs 打造基礎模型，協助化學家優化化學反應條件。

highlight.en: Founded by Cambridge friends, Yoneda makes ML-driven reaction optimization—finding ideal temperature, concentration, and catalyst—accessible to lab chemists without programming skills.
highlight.zh: 由劍橋大學同窗創立，Yoneda 讓 ML 驅動的反應優化——找出理想溫度、濃度與催化劑——無需程式技能即可供實驗室化學家使用。

summary.en: Blume was an AI copilot web app that streamlined quoting and renewals for health insurance brokers.
summary.zh: Blume 是一款 AI 副駕網頁應用，為健康保險經紀人簡化報價與續保流程。

highlight.en: Blume targeted the manual data entry brokers do—around six hours a week—by streamlining insurance quoting, renewal, and revenue operations workflows.
highlight.zh: Blume 針對經紀人每週約六小時的手動資料輸入，簡化保險報價、續保與營收營運流程。

summary.en: Attunement turns fragmented behavioral health records into a single, structured patient picture.
summary.zh: Attunement 將零散的行為健康病歷整理成單一、結構化的病患全貌。

highlight.en: Attunement extracts, reconciles, and structures behavioral health records from any source, giving operators, clinicians, and AI systems one accurate view of the patient.
highlight.zh: Attunement 從任何來源擷取、比對並結構化行為健康病歷，為營運者、臨床人員與 AI 系統提供單一準確的病患樣貌。

summary.en: Speck is an AI notetaker that automates the admin work around back-to-back calls.
summary.zh: Speck 是一款 AI 筆記工具，能自動處理連續會議前後的行政工作。

highlight.en: Speck handles pre-call research, listens to every word, and learns how you work to generate meeting notes, follow-ups, and action items in your own style.
highlight.zh: Speck 負責會議前的調研、聆聽每一句話，並學習你的工作方式，以你的風格產出會議筆記、後續追蹤與行動項目。

summary.en: Scout is an AI insights tool that helps consumer products companies grow topline revenue.
summary.zh: Scout 是協助消費品公司提升營收的 AI 洞察工具。

highlight.en: Scout ingests retailer portal and syndicated data (SPINS, NielsenIQ) to tell sales teams which accounts to expand, which SKUs to prioritize, and which promotions drove incremental sales.
highlight.zh: Scout 匯入零售商門戶與聯合資料（SPINS、NielsenIQ），告訴銷售團隊該拓展哪些客戶、優先哪些 SKU，以及哪些促銷帶來增量銷售。

summary.en: 14.ai is software that runs brands autonomously, from demand generation to fulfillment and support.
summary.zh: 14.ai 是自主運營品牌的軟體，涵蓋從需求創造到出貨與客戶服務。

highlight.en: 14.ai connects acquisition, operations, support, and decision-making into one intelligent layer, and the team uses it to launch and run its own brands, starting with gloglo.com.
highlight.zh: 14.ai 將獲客、營運、客服與決策整合為單一智慧層，團隊以此推出並經營自有品牌，從 gloglo.com 起步。

summary.en: PandasAI is an open-source platform for conversational data analysis in plain English.
summary.zh: PandasAI 是一個用自然英文進行對話式資料分析的開源平台。

highlight.en: Enterprises connect their dataframes, databases, or datalakes so anyone in the company can visualize data and ask complex queries in plain language for better decisions.
highlight.zh: 企業可連接其資料框、資料庫或資料湖，讓公司內任何人都能以自然語言視覺化資料、提出複雜查詢，做出更佳決策。

summary.en: Dime automates administrative busywork at healthcare clinics with HIPAA-compliant AI agents.
summary.zh: Dime 以符合 HIPAA 的 AI 代理自動化醫療診所的行政雜務。

highlight.en: Dime integrates directly with RIS and EHR systems for end-to-end automation of insurance coordination, referrals, scheduling, and patient communication—rather than adding another software layer.
highlight.zh: Dime 直接整合 RIS 與 EHR 系統，端到端自動化保險協調、轉診、排程與病患溝通，而非再疊加一層軟體。

summary.en: Bilanc uses AI to give engineering leaders insights that boost developer productivity.
summary.zh: Bilanc 運用 AI 為工程主管提供洞察，提升開發者生產力。

highlight.en: Bilanc analyzes every line of code written and surfaces insights to improve developer experience and build more productive, happier engineering teams.
highlight.zh: Bilanc 分析每一行寫下的程式碼，提出洞察以改善開發者體驗，打造更高效、更快樂的工程團隊。

summary.en: Aftercare runs surveys with AI-powered follow-up questions for deeper insights.
summary.zh: Aftercare 以 AI 驅動的追問進行問卷調查，挖掘更深層的洞察。

highlight.en: Aftercare acts like a skilled interviewer for every survey, automatically asking intelligent follow-up questions to dig into each respondent's answers.
highlight.zh: Aftercare 為每份問卷扮演熟練訪談者的角色，自動提出聰明的追問，深入挖掘每位受訪者的回答。

summary.en: Risotto auto-solves IT support requests using AI, directly within chat.
summary.zh: Risotto 運用 AI 在聊天中直接自動解決 IT 支援請求。

highlight.en: Via natural-language ChatOps, Risotto grants and time-limits software access, serves knowledge, and routes approvals, cutting resolution times, SaaS spend, and security risk with 24/7 automation.
highlight.zh: 透過自然語言 ChatOps，Risotto 授予並限時管理軟體存取、提供知識並處理審批，以全天候自動化縮短解決時間、降低 SaaS 支出與安全風險。

summary.en: camelAI is your own AI software engineer that builds and deploys custom tools for your business.
summary.zh: camelAI 是你專屬的 AI 軟體工程師，為你的業務打造並部署客製化工具。

highlight.en: You describe what you want and camelAI builds it, deploys it to a live URL, and keeps it running—personal software made for your team, data, and workflows, no developers required.
highlight.zh: 你描述需求，camelAI 便完成開發、部署到上線網址並持續運行——為你的團隊、資料與流程量身打造的個人化軟體，無需開發人員。

summary.en: Vista Power installs and finances solar and battery storage for businesses at $0 upfront.
summary.zh: Vista Power 以零頭期款為企業安裝並融資太陽能與電池儲能系統。

highlight.en: Vista designs, finances, installs, and manages energy storage and solar at commercial and multifamily properties, saving up to 30% on energy bills; its founders came from SpaceX, Rocket Lab, NASA, and Firefly.
highlight.zh: Vista 為商業與多戶住宅設計、融資、安裝並管理儲能與太陽能系統，最多可省 30% 電費；創辦團隊出身 SpaceX、Rocket Lab、NASA 與 Firefly。

summary.en: xPay handles international billing, sales tax, and payments for SaaS businesses with overseas customers.
summary.zh: xPay 為擁有海外客戶的 SaaS 企業處理國際帳務、銷售稅與付款。

highlight.en: xPay abstracts away compliance, remittance, and integration complexity, streamlining invoicing, reconciliation, foreign sales tax, and payment acceptance behind the scenes.
highlight.zh: xPay 將合規、匯款與整合的複雜性抽象化，在後台簡化發票、對帳、外國銷售稅與收款流程。

summary.en: Fileforge was an API for PDF document workflows—generate, manipulate, sign, and track files.
summary.zh: Fileforge 是用於 PDF 文件工作流程的 API，可生成、操作、簽署與追蹤檔案。

highlight.en: Fileforge let developers generate, host, share, sign, and track documents in one place, with an open-source library for building complex, document-centric workflows.
highlight.zh: Fileforge 讓開發者在同一處生成、託管、分享、簽署並追蹤文件，並提供開源函式庫以建構複雜的文件導向工作流程。

summary.en: Silogy is an AI-powered platform for chip developers to simulate and debug their designs.
summary.zh: Silogy 是供晶片開發者模擬與除錯設計的 AI 驅動平台。

highlight.en: Silogy applies AI to test and debug semiconductor designs, helping chip developers simulate and find issues in their work.
highlight.zh: Silogy 將 AI 應用於半導體設計的測試與除錯，協助晶片開發者模擬並找出設計中的問題。

summary.en: Forge gets companies refunds on tariffs and duties by automating duty drawback.
summary.zh: Forge 透過自動化關稅退稅流程，為企業取回已繳的關稅與規費。

highlight.en: Forge recovers tariffs and duties on imported goods later exported or scrapped, taking full ownership from organizing data to filing claims so billions in unclaimed refunds get unlocked.
highlight.zh: Forge 為之後出口或報廢的進口貨物取回關稅與規費，從整理資料到提出申請全程包辦，釋放數十億美元未領退稅。

summary.en: Tower is an AI-powered platform that accelerates M&A transactional due diligence.
summary.zh: Tower 是加速併購交易盡職調查的 AI 驅動平台。

highlight.en: By consolidating disparate diligence workflows into one centralized platform, Tower helps deal teams stay organized, spot issues earlier, and close deals faster.
highlight.zh: Tower 將分散的盡職調查流程整合到單一集中平台，協助交易團隊保持條理、更早發現問題並更快完成交易。

summary.en: kater.ai delivers complete data analysis from a single business question in seconds.
summary.zh: kater.ai 從單一商業問題出發，在數秒內完成整套資料分析。

highlight.en: Kater's classification engine turns one business question into a contextualized package of sub-questions, writes the code, and returns insights in seconds—making every user an expert analyst on trusted data.
highlight.zh: Kater 的分類引擎將一個商業問題轉化為情境化的子問題組合、自動寫程式，並在數秒內回傳洞察——讓每位使用者都能在可信資料上化身專家分析師。

summary.en: Blacksmith runs your GitHub Actions CI up to twice as fast at half the cost.
summary.zh: Blacksmith 讓你的 GitHub Actions CI 速度最快提升兩倍、成本減半。

highlight.en: Blacksmith runs CI on high-performance gaming CPUs to deliver compute that's faster, cheaper, and more reliable than hyperscaler spot instances, starting with GitHub Actions.
highlight.zh: Blacksmith 在高效能遊戲 CPU 上執行 CI，提供比超大規模雲端競價執行個體更快、更便宜且更可靠的運算，從 GitHub Actions 起步。

summary.en: InspectMind AI is an AI agent that reviews construction drawings to catch issues early.
summary.zh: InspectMind AI 是審查施工圖、及早揪出問題的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: InspectMind's AI agent catches issues in construction drawings before they turn into costly rework and project delays.
highlight.zh: InspectMind 的 AI 代理在施工圖中的問題演變成昂貴的返工與工期延誤前，便將其揪出。

summary.en: Reprompt builds AI agents that keep location and mapping data up to date.
summary.zh: Reprompt 打造 AI 代理，讓地點與地圖資料保持最新。

highlight.en: Mapping companies like Radar and TomTom use Reprompt's agents—spanning web, vision, and document reading—to get live information about points of interest and businesses.
highlight.zh: Radar、TomTom 等地圖公司使用 Reprompt 涵蓋網頁、視覺與文件閱讀的代理，取得興趣點與商家的即時資訊。

summary.en: Relari builds infrastructure for trustworthy AI agents in the Software 3.0 era.
summary.zh: Relari 為 Software 3.0 時代打造可信賴 AI 代理的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Relari is behind Nuvi.dev—a natural-language agent builder turning plain-English specs into verifiable agents—plus open-source frameworks Agent Contract and continuous-eval.
highlight.zh: Relari 是 Nuvi.dev 的開發團隊——一個將自然英文規格轉為可驗證代理的代理建構器——並打造 Agent Contract 與 continuous-eval 等開源框架。

summary.en: RadMate AI was a copilot for radiologists that drafted full reports from medical images.
summary.zh: RadMate AI 是放射科醫師的副駕，能從醫學影像草擬完整報告。

highlight.en: Powered by a foundational model for medical imaging, RadMate read radiology images and generated full reports for radiologists to review and submit.
highlight.zh: RadMate 以醫學影像的基礎模型為動力，判讀放射影像並生成完整報告，供放射科醫師審閱後提交。

summary.en: Nuanced is a desktop AI coding app that helps developers turn rough ideas into clear specs.
summary.zh: Nuanced 是一款桌面 AI 編碼 App，協助開發者將粗略想法轉化為清晰規格。

highlight.en: Nuanced's agents help developers shape rough ideas into clear specifications, then stay connected to the work as agents build the software.
highlight.zh: Nuanced 的代理協助開發者將粗略想法塑造成清晰規格，並在代理建構軟體的過程中持續參與工作。

summary.en: Maia is an AI relationship app that helps couples connect and stay together.
summary.zh: Maia 是協助伴侶增進連結、長久相伴的 AI 關係 App。

highlight.en: Trained by relationship experts, Maia offers daily activities, personalized advice, proactive insights, quizzes, and games grounded in relationship science.
highlight.zh: Maia 由關係專家訓練，以關係科學為基礎，提供每日活動、個人化建議、主動洞察、測驗與遊戲。

summary.en: Saga AI deploys voice agents for healthcare operations like scheduling and patient intake.
summary.zh: Saga AI 為醫療營運（如排程與病患收案）部署語音代理。

highlight.en: Saga's voice agents handle scheduling, patient intake, and care gap outreach for practices, ACOs, and health systems, connecting directly to the EHR in real time.
highlight.zh: Saga 的語音代理為診所、ACO 與醫療體系處理排程、病患收案與照護缺口外展，並即時直接連接 EHR。

summary.en: Quary was the first in-browser analytics engineering platform with a full model-test-deploy workflow.
summary.zh: Quary 是首個將完整模型-測試-部署工作流程搬進瀏覽器的分析工程平台。

highlight.en: Quary brought the entire analytics engineering workflow into the browser, letting growth analysts at its fintech customer self-serve and reduce reliance on data engineering.
highlight.zh: Quary 將整個分析工程工作流程搬進瀏覽器，讓其金融科技客戶的成長團隊分析師能自助作業，減少對資料工程團隊的依賴。

summary.en: malibou is the first all-in-one payroll and HR software for French SMBs.
summary.zh: malibou 是首個專為法國中小企業打造的一站式薪資與人資軟體。

highlight.en: By tapping newly opened French payroll-engine APIs, malibou unifies payroll and HR in one web app—managing employees, running payroll, and tracking compliance—something previously impossible.
highlight.zh: malibou 運用法國薪資引擎新開放的 API，將薪資與人資整合於單一網頁應用——管理員工、執行薪資並追蹤合規——這在過去無法實現。

summary.en: Pretzel AI builds AI tooling for developers.
summary.zh: Pretzel AI 為開發者打造 AI 工具。

highlight.en: Pretzel AI focuses on building AI tooling, accessible at withpretzel.com.
highlight.zh: Pretzel AI 專注於打造 AI 工具，可於 withpretzel.com 取得。

summary.en: Argon AI lets biopharma professionals run complex pharma intelligence workflows in natural language.
summary.zh: Argon AI 讓生物製藥專業人士以自然語言執行複雜的製藥情報工作流程。

highlight.en: Argon delivers thorough answers on clinical trials, treatments, and the competitive market in minutes rather than months; co-founder Samy helped build Flatiron Health's data analytics business.
highlight.zh: Argon 在數分鐘而非數月內，就臨床試驗、現有療法與競爭市場提供詳盡答覆；共同創辦人 Samy 曾協助打造 Flatiron Health 的資料分析業務。

summary.en: Mango Health was building an AI guide for OCD offering ERP-like sessions and 24/7 support.
summary.zh: Mango Health 打造針對強迫症的 AI 引導，提供類 ERP 療程與全天候支援。

highlight.en: Targeting OCD—which affects nearly 2% of people and takes an average of 12 years to diagnose—Mango offered ERP-like sessions, 24/7 support, and AI-guided lessons at a fraction of traditional treatment cost.
highlight.zh: 強迫症影響近 2% 人口、平均需 12 年才確診，Mango 以遠低於傳統治療的成本提供類 ERP 療程、全天候支援與 AI 引導課程。

summary.en: Aidy is a mobile app helping people manage chronic conditions, starting with IBD.
summary.zh: Aidy 是協助人們管理慢性疾病的行動 App，首先聚焦於發炎性腸道疾病。

highlight.en: Aidy lets IBD users log symptoms, diet, and treatments, applies clinical indices to track disease severity, and identifies patterns to supplement clinician care.
highlight.zh: Aidy 讓發炎性腸道疾病患者記錄症狀、飲食與治療，運用臨床指標追蹤病情嚴重度，並找出規律以輔助臨床照護。

summary.en: Agentic Labs builds AI system-design tools for dev teams, starting with Glide.
summary.zh: Agentic Labs 為開發團隊打造 AI 系統設計工具，首推產品 Glide。

highlight.en: Its first product Glide is an AI-first editor for writing technical design docs that connects to your codebase, saving engineering teams time on triage, planning, and implementing complex changes.
highlight.zh: 其首款產品 Glide 是專為撰寫技術設計文件打造、能連接程式庫的 AI 優先編輯器，為工程團隊在分流、規劃與實作複雜變更上節省時間。

summary.en: Leaping autonomously root-causes bugs and generates tested code fixes.
summary.zh: Leaping 自主找出 bug 根本原因，並生成經測試的修復程式碼。

highlight.en: As AI code assistants spread and engineers spend more time fixing than writing code, Leaping automates root-cause analysis and produces tested fixes for shipped bugs.
highlight.zh: 隨著 AI 編碼助手普及、工程師花在修復而非撰寫程式碼的時間增加，Leaping 自動化根因分析，並為已上線的 bug 產出經測試的修復。

summary.en: MathDash is an online learning platform for math competitions.
summary.zh: MathDash 是專為數學競賽打造的線上學習平台。

highlight.en: MathDash gets students hooked on working through textbooks and watching their own improvement over time.
highlight.zh: MathDash 讓學生沉迷於鑽研教科書，並見證自己隨時間的進步。

summary.en: Patchwork was an AI-powered communication tool offering a personalized feed for each team member.
summary.zh: Patchwork 是一款 AI 驅動的溝通工具，為每位團隊成員提供個人化動態。

highlight.en: Patchwork aimed to replace inefficient Slack with an intelligent, per-person feed of daily updates, design and engineering discussions, and announcements.
highlight.zh: Patchwork 旨在以智慧化的個人專屬動態取代效率不彰的 Slack，匯整每日更新、設計與工程討論及公告。

summary.en: Ecliptor works on AI and embeddings.
summary.zh: Ecliptor 專注於 AI 與嵌入技術。

highlight.en: Ecliptor focuses on AI and embeddings, accessible at ecliptor.ai.
highlight.zh: Ecliptor 專注於 AI 與嵌入技術，可於 ecliptor.ai 取得。

summary.en: Panelytic provides payment infrastructure, identity, and financial controls for autonomous machines.
summary.zh: Panelytic 為自主機器提供付款基礎設施、身分驗證與財務控管。

highlight.en: Panelytic delivers payments, identity, and financial controls purpose-built for autonomous machines.
highlight.zh: Panelytic 提供專為自主機器打造的付款、身分驗證與財務控管功能。

summary.en: SynsoryBio creates protein therapeutics that activate only at diseased tissue.
summary.zh: SynsoryBio 開發僅在病變組織才啟動的蛋白質藥物。

highlight.en: Using 'if-then' conditional logic, SynsoryBio's proteins sense their location and activate only at disease sites, potentially widening the therapeutic window for potent cancer and autoimmune drugs.
highlight.zh: SynsoryBio 運用「若-則」條件邏輯，讓蛋白質感知所在位置、僅在病灶處啟動，有望擴大強效抗癌與自體免疫藥物的治療窗口。

summary.en: Copper Health is a patient engagement and remote therapeutic monitoring platform for physical therapy.
summary.zh: Copper Health 是專為物理治療打造的病患互動與遠端治療監測平台。

highlight.en: Copper Health is an all-in-one, AI-powered remote therapeutic monitoring platform designed specifically for physical therapy.
highlight.zh: Copper Health 是一個專為物理治療設計、以 AI 驅動的一站式遠端治療監測平台。

summary.en: Engines was an AI platform engineer that set up any repo with a single command.
summary.zh: Engines 是一位 AI 平台工程師，能以單一指令設定任何程式庫。

highlight.en: Engines acted as an AI platform engineer that containerizes codebases, debugs Terraform code, and helps get complex monorepos set up.
highlight.zh: Engines 扮演 AI 平台工程師的角色，能將程式庫容器化、為 Terraform 程式碼除錯，並協助設定複雜的單一大型程式庫。

summary.en: OneGrep is a DevOps AI agent that automates manual DevOps tasks across teams' tools.
summary.zh: OneGrep 是一個 DevOps AI 代理，能跨團隊工具自動化手動的 DevOps 任務。

highlight.en: OneGrep works across integrations to search, correlate, and automate tasks like runbook automation during incidents; its founders built systems at scale at Coinbase, Disney, and Amazon.
highlight.zh: OneGrep 跨整合工具搜尋、關聯並自動化任務，例如事故期間的 runbook 自動化；創辦人曾在 Coinbase、Disney 與 Amazon 大規模建構系統。

summary.en: Selera Medical offers a one-time, device-based treatment for heart failure.
summary.zh: Selera Medical 提供一次性、以裝置為基礎的心臟衰竭療法。

highlight.en: Selera's minimally invasive device leverages the body's innate fluid-management system to offload trapped fluid and prevent future buildup, with sustained effect from a one-time procedure.
highlight.zh: Selera 的微創裝置利用人體先天的體液管理系統排出滯留體液並預防再度累積，一次性手術即具持續效果。

summary.en: Glimmer was an AI search tool for finding information in massive PDFs.
summary.zh: Glimmer 是用於在超大型 PDF 中搜尋資訊的 AI 工具。

highlight.en: Glimmer intelligently indexes documents over 1,000 pages so professionals in construction, law, finance, and healthcare can search in natural language and get answers with verifiable page sources.
highlight.zh: Glimmer 智慧索引逾千頁的文件，讓營建、法律、金融與醫療專業人士能以自然語言搜尋，並取得附可驗證頁碼來源的答案。

summary.en: Toolify was a dev-first way to build internal tools with AI.
summary.zh: Toolify 是以開發者為先、用 AI 建構內部工具的方案。

highlight.en: Toolify combined a starter kit, a VSCode extension whose AI builds internal tools end to end, and a web app to deploy them—pairing low-code speed with a developer escape hatch.
highlight.zh: Toolify 結合啟動套件、能端到端建構內部工具的 VSCode AI 擴充套件，以及部署用的網頁應用——兼具低程式碼的速度與開發者的彈性出口。

summary.en: Consul is a stablecoin payouts platform for marketplaces, agencies, and startups.
summary.zh: Consul 是專為市集、代理商與新創打造的穩定幣付款平台。

highlight.en: Consul makes it easy for marketplaces, agencies, and startups to make payouts using stablecoins, building the future of payouts for the online economy.
highlight.zh: Consul 讓市集、代理商與新創能輕鬆以穩定幣發放款項，打造線上經濟的付款未來。

summary.en: Resonance is a self-improving content bank that hyper-personalizes marketing campaigns.
summary.zh: Resonance 是一個自我優化的內容庫，能高度個人化行銷活動。

highlight.en: Resonance hyper-personalizes MarTech campaign content, then automatically refreshes and stores high-performing content for re-use.
highlight.zh: Resonance 高度個人化行銷科技活動內容，並自動更新並儲存高成效內容以供再利用。

summary.en: crmCopilot was an AI assistant that handles CRM grunt work to upgrade Salesforce.
summary.zh: crmCopilot 是處理 CRM 雜務、為 Salesforce 升級的 AI 助手。

highlight.en: crmCopilot detected when a CRM needed attention and drafted precise updates for one-click approval, turning hours of manual data entry into seconds while flagging next steps and follow-ups.
highlight.zh: crmCopilot 偵測 CRM 何時需要處理，草擬精準更新供一鍵核准，將數小時的手動資料輸入縮短為數秒，並標示後續步驟與追蹤事項。

summary.en: Aedilic builds open-source software for detecting AI-generated images and deepfakes.
summary.zh: Aedilic 打造偵測 AI 生成影像與深偽的開源軟體。

highlight.en: Aedilic's open-source software detects AI-generated images across diffusion models, GANs, and deepfakes.
highlight.zh: Aedilic 的開源軟體能偵測涵蓋擴散模型、GAN 與深偽的 AI 生成影像。

summary.en: Ellipsis is an AI developer tool that reviews code and fixes bugs on pull requests.
summary.zh: Ellipsis 是一款在 pull request 上審查程式碼並修復 bug 的 AI 開發者工具。

highlight.en: Ellipsis uses LLM agents to catch logical errors, security issues, and style violations, and developers can tag @ellipsis-dev to have it implement and run the tested fix itself.
highlight.zh: Ellipsis 運用 LLM 代理揪出邏輯錯誤、安全問題與風格違規，開發者只需標註 @ellipsis-dev，它便會自行實作並執行經測試的修復。

summary.en: Metofico is a no-code data analysis tool tailored for life science research.
summary.zh: Metofico 是專為生命科學研究打造的無程式碼資料分析工具。

highlight.en: Metofico lets life scientists analyze massive datasets—from brain activity like photometry and EEG to AI-powered animal tracking—without programming, saving months of work.
highlight.zh: Metofico 讓生命科學家無需程式即可分析龐大資料集——從光度測量、腦電圖等腦活動，到 AI 驅動的研究動物追蹤——節省數月工作量。

summary.en: Browser Buddy was a recommendation system that surfaces great essays on any topic.
summary.zh: Browser Buddy 是一套推薦系統，能找出任何主題的優秀文章。

highlight.en: Browser Buddy recommends great Internet writing, helping readers find quality essays for any topic they're interested in.
highlight.zh: Browser Buddy 推薦網路上的優秀寫作，協助讀者找到任何感興趣主題的優質文章。

summary.en: SevnAI works on AI gaming.
summary.zh: SevnAI 專注於 AI 遊戲。

highlight.en: SevnAI focuses on AI gaming, accessible at sevn.ai.
highlight.zh: SevnAI 專注於 AI 遊戲，可於 sevn.ai 取得。

summary.en: Superagent does red teaming for AI agents to help developers make their apps safe.
summary.zh: Superagent 為 AI 代理進行紅隊測試，協助開發者讓其應用更安全。

highlight.en: Specialized attack agents probe production AI for data leaks, harmful outputs, and unwanted actions, then deliver findings, remediation guidance, and a Safety Page for sales and security reviews.
highlight.zh: 專門的攻擊代理探測正式環境 AI 的資料外洩、有害輸出與非預期行為，並提供發現結果、修復建議與可用於銷售與安全審查的安全頁面。

summary.en: Preloop translates experimental ML scripts into production machine learning services.
summary.zh: Preloop 將實驗性的 ML 腳本轉化為正式環境的機器學習服務。

highlight.en: With only 2 in 10 ML models reaching production, Preloop automates deployment so teams realize more value from machine learning and focus on science instead of engineering.
highlight.zh: 由於僅有十分之二的 ML 模型能上線，Preloop 自動化部署流程，讓團隊從機器學習中獲得更多價值，並專注於科學而非工程。

summary.en: Soundry AI offers generative AI tools that remix any song into any style.
summary.zh: Soundry AI 提供生成式 AI 工具，能將任何歌曲改編成任何風格。

highlight.en: Soundry builds generative AI tools for fan engagement; its product Groove lets you remix a song—like Taylor Swift in the style of Slayer—into any style.
highlight.zh: Soundry 打造提升粉絲互動的生成式 AI 工具；其產品 Groove 讓你將歌曲改編成任何風格，例如以 Slayer 的風格重混 Taylor Swift。

summary.en: Abel was transforming document review for litigation teams.
summary.zh: Abel 致力於革新訴訟團隊的文件審查作業。

highlight.en: Abel let attorneys answer nuanced questions drawn from context spread across thousands of documents, eliminating the trade-off between depth and breadth in review.
highlight.zh: Abel 讓律師能回答橫跨數千份文件、需綜合上下文的細膩問題，免去審查時在深度與廣度間取捨。

summary.en: Clarum builds AI agents for private market diligence, monitoring, and reporting.
summary.zh: Clarum 為私募市場的盡職調查、監測與報告打造 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Clarum's agents learn each firm's individualized process—checklists, templates, scoring models—and act as a self-updating knowledge base across every document the firm has seen.
highlight.zh: Clarum 的代理學習各家機構個別化的流程——檢查表、範本、評分模型——並化身涵蓋機構所有文件、會自我更新的知識庫。

summary.en: HeartByte's platform Storio lets creators write original or derivative fiction 10x faster with GenAI.
summary.zh: HeartByte 的平台 Storio 運用生成式 AI 讓創作者寫小說快 10 倍。

highlight.en: Storio is a content platform where creators write original fiction or derivative works set in existing fictional worlds 10x faster, building communities around the worlds they love.
highlight.zh: Storio 是一個內容平台，讓創作者以快 10 倍的速度撰寫原創小說或衍生於既有虛構世界的作品，並圍繞所愛的世界建立社群。

summary.en: Oma Care builds infrastructure to train and pay family caregivers looking after their parents.
summary.zh: Oma Care 打造基礎設施，培訓並支薪給照顧父母的家庭照護者。

highlight.en: Oma Care is building the technical infrastructure to train and pay the 53 million family caregivers in the US, so people can get paid for taking care of their parents.
highlight.zh: Oma Care 正在打造技術基礎設施，培訓並支薪給全美 5,300 萬名家庭照護者，讓人們能因照顧父母而獲得報酬。

summary.en: Focal is an AI video creation tool that lets anyone make and share TV episodes and movies.
summary.zh: Focal 是一款 AI 影片創作工具，讓任何人都能製作並分享電視劇集與電影。

highlight.en: Focal combines existing video, audio, and language models into a simple workflow so anyone can create and share full TV episodes and movies.
highlight.zh: Focal 將既有的影片、音訊與語言模型整合成簡單的工作流程，讓任何人都能創作並分享完整的電視劇集與電影。

summary.en: Lumetric is an AI analyst and coworker that does real work for deal teams.
summary.zh: Lumetric 是為交易團隊實際完成工作的 AI 分析師與同事。

highlight.en: Lumetric acts as an AI coworker for business professionals, handling models, decks, data cleanup, and more rather than just assisting.
highlight.zh: Lumetric 化身商務人士的 AI 同事，實際處理財務模型、簡報、資料清理等工作，而非僅止於輔助。

summary.en: Thorntale was an AI-powered presentation editor that can directly edit your slides.
summary.zh: Thorntale 是一款能直接編輯投影片的 AI 簡報編輯器。

highlight.en: Thorntale's AI assistant edits slide design and content and suggests improvements, paired with an advanced design system plus enterprise features like data connections and send-as-email.
highlight.zh: Thorntale 的 AI 助手能編輯投影片設計與內容並提出改進建議，搭配先進設計系統，以及資料連接、以郵件寄送等企業級功能。

summary.en: Deep24 is an AI coach that syncs with your data to build plans for improving your life.
summary.zh: Deep24 是一位 AI 教練，能同步你的資料並制定改善生活的計畫。

highlight.en: Deep24 syncs with all your data sources to understand you, then comes up with personalized plans to improve your entire life.
highlight.zh: Deep24 同步你所有的資料來源以了解你，再提出個人化計畫來全面改善你的人生。

summary.en: Adapted is an AI physical therapist that builds personalized rehab programs for athletes.
summary.zh: Adapted 是一位 AI 物理治療師，為運動員打造個人化的復健計畫。

highlight.en: Athletes tell Adapted their injury history, sport, and goals, and it builds a program—no generic exercises—to rehab injuries, prevent future ones, and improve mobility; available on iOS.
highlight.zh: 運動員告訴 Adapted 自己的傷病史、運動項目與目標，它便量身打造計畫——絕非通用動作——以復健、預防傷害並提升活動度；已於 iOS 上架。

summary.en: Basepilot builds line-of-business-specific AI agents for insurance claims operations.
summary.zh: Basepilot 為保險理賠營運打造針對各業務線的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Insurers, TPAs, and MGAs—including Old Republic International and Zurich—use Basepilot's line-of-business-specific AI agents to make claims operations more efficient and less costly.
highlight.zh: 保險公司、第三方管理機構與管理型核保代理（含 Old Republic International 與 Zurich）運用 Basepilot 針對各業務線的 AI 代理，讓理賠營運更有效率、成本更低。

summary.en: Fluently is an AI speaking coach for non-native English professionals.
summary.zh: Fluently 是專為非母語英語專業人士打造的 AI 口說教練。

highlight.en: Built for those past the basics who want real-conversation confidence, Fluently offers unlimited speaking practice, a personalized plan, and free level assessment—available 24/7 at a fraction of a human tutor's cost.
highlight.zh: Fluently 為已具基礎、想在真實對話中更有自信的人打造，提供無限口說練習、個人化計畫與免費程度評估，全天候可用且成本遠低於真人家教。

summary.en: Magic Hour is a platform for professional AI video generation.
summary.zh: Magic Hour 是專業 AI 影片生成平台。

highlight.en: Magic Hour brings the best AI video models into one workflow, making a polished video as easy as picking a template and customizing it.
highlight.zh: Magic Hour 將最佳的 AI 影片模型整合至單一工作流程，讓製作精緻影片如同挑選範本並客製化般簡單。

summary.en: Penciled is an AI front office assistant for physical therapy clinics.
summary.zh: Penciled 是物理治療診所的 AI 前台助理。

highlight.en: Penciled's AI schedules plans of care, sends reminders, processes last-minute cancellations, and fills openings via an automated waitlist, booking thousands of appointments monthly and integrating with EHRs like WebPT.
highlight.zh: Penciled 的 AI 安排照護計畫、發送提醒、處理臨時取消，並透過自動候補名單填補空檔，每月預約數千次看診，並與 WebPT 等 EHR 整合。

summary.en: Arcane is building an AI-powered game platform where anyone can create and play games without code.
summary.zh: Arcane 打造 AI 驅動的遊戲平台，讓任何人無需寫程式即可創作並遊玩遊戲。

highlight.en: Arcane lets anyone create and play games without writing code, opening game-making to people who aren't developers.
highlight.zh: Arcane 讓任何人無需撰寫程式即可創作並遊玩遊戲，將遊戲製作開放給非開發者。

summary.en: Polar helps remote workers and freelancers manage their USD earnings globally.
summary.zh: Polar 協助遠端工作者與自由業者在全球管理其美元收入。

highlight.en: Polar lets remote workers, freelancers, and ship crew open a US bank account in minutes, send money to 120+ countries, earn 2-6% interest, and invest in gold, Bitcoin, and Ethereum from $1.
highlight.zh: Polar 讓遠端工作者、自由業者與船員在數分鐘內開設美國銀行帳戶、匯款至 120 多國、賺取 2-6% 利息，並以 1 美元起投資黃金、比特幣與以太幣。

summary.en: OpenFoundry is an open-source platform for building, deploying, and scaling open-source AI 10x faster.
summary.zh: OpenFoundry 是一個開源平台，讓開源 AI 的建構、部署與擴展速度提升 10 倍。

highlight.en: OpenFoundry lets engineers ship their open-source AI stack with one line of code, positioning itself as an open-source alternative to Hugging Face.
highlight.zh: OpenFoundry 讓工程師以一行程式碼即可上線其開源 AI 堆疊，定位為 Hugging Face 的開源替代方案。

summary.en: Eris Biotech develops cancer drugs that engage the immune system to fight tumors.
summary.zh: Eris Biotech 開發調動免疫系統對抗腫瘤的抗癌藥物。

highlight.en: Eris develops small molecules that inhibit immune suppression so the immune system aggressively attacks solid tumors, starting with mesothelioma.
highlight.zh: Eris 開發抑制免疫抑制作用的小分子，讓免疫系統猛烈攻擊實體腫瘤，並從間皮瘤著手。

summary.en: Latted is a unified editor to generate and edit professional AI video projects.
summary.zh: Latted 是一個整合式編輯器，可生成並編輯專業的 AI 影片專案。

highlight.en: Latted lets creators generate a 10-minute video from a single prompt or build projects from scratch in one tool, replacing the juggling of hundreds of clips across multiple apps.
highlight.zh: Latted 讓創作者在單一工具中以一個提示生成 10 分鐘影片，或從頭打造專案，免去在多個應用間切換、處理數百個素材的麻煩。

summary.en: renderlet is a framework for building interactive, high-performance graphics applications that run anywhere.
summary.zh: renderlet 是一個用於打造可在任何平台運行的互動式高效能圖形應用的框架。

highlight.en: renderlet lets developers write high-level 2D/3D graphics code, then compiles it to WebAssembly and embeds a portable engine so graphics render safely on any platform's GPU; its runtime is open-source.
highlight.zh: renderlet 讓開發者撰寫高階 2D/3D 圖形程式碼，再編譯為 WebAssembly 並嵌入可攜式引擎，使圖形能安全地在任何平台的 GPU 上渲染；其執行環境為開源。

summary.en: Dragoneye lets developers build custom video detection models in under five minutes.
summary.zh: Dragoneye 讓開發者在五分鐘內建構客製化的影片偵測模型。

highlight.en: Dragoneye builds custom image and video detection models in under five minutes, removing the arduous work of annotating training data or doing any machine learning by hand.
highlight.zh: Dragoneye 在五分鐘內建構客製化的影像與影片偵測模型，免去標註訓練資料或親自進行機器學習的繁重工作。
